examples: If this is an ellipse around the Earth, this would be perigee and this would be apogee.
The Moon reaches its absolute perigee once a year.
Now we want to know what the situation is with perigee and with apogee.
Sunday's supermoon will technically be a perigee full moon, the closest full moon of the year, NASA says.
On Friday, Phobos-Grunt was moving around the Earth at an altitude that varied between 177km (perigee) and 224km (apogee).
